summary: Story 1.2 is implementation-ready for Dev. It is clear, sourced, bounded to profile setup, and includes focused tests for the profile gate and Livewire setup screen.

template_compliance.notes: Required story sections are present and no template placeholders were found.

executor_assignment.notes: Executor @dev and quality gate @architect are distinct known agents with non-empty quality gate tools.

goal_context_clarity.notes: Story value, Epic 1 relationship, Story 1.1 dependency context, and business purpose are explicit.

technical_guidance.notes: Key migration, service, middleware, route, Livewire, localization, model, relationship, and test locations are identified.

reference_effectiveness.notes: References point to specific PRD, architecture, UI architecture, framework, previous story, QA, and handoff artifacts.

self_containment.notes: Core requirements, edge cases, route behavior, scope boundaries, and implementation constraints are included directly in the story.

testing_guidance.notes: Route and Livewire test files, required scenarios, and focused commands are listed.

security_scope.notes: Tenant membership, profile gate redirects, non-member generic denial, and Filament/account route preservation are called out.

coderabbit_integration.notes: Disabled in core-config.yaml; story includes the required skip notice.

code_intelligence.notes: isCodeIntelAvailable returned unavailable in this session.

anti_hallucination.notes: Technical claims were cross-checked against current local source docs and Context7 docs for Laravel middleware aliases and Livewire full-page component routing.

dev_readiness.notes: A Dev agent can implement the story as written without needing to invent scope.

non_blocking_notes: No docs/stories/.session-state.yaml exists, so EpicContextAccumulator returned no accumulated session context.
Prefer the local Route::livewire convention for full-page Livewire routes unless implementation context proves otherwise.
Story 1.1 file still says Ready for Review, but the DevOps handoff records PR #4 merged and QA gate waived for repo-wide debt external to Story 1.1.
Jira child story sync remains pending; local story is the source of truth for implementation.
